ariaSpec.usage: The element should be an input or have role="textbox".

ariaSpec.attribute: label for or aria-label or aria-labelledby (when has accessible name)
ariaSpec.usage: The input requires an accessible name (provided by consuming app).
Rendered when the DateInput is in an invalid state.
Points to the hint or error message.
Rendered when the DateInput is readonly.
Rendered when the DateInput is disabled.

kbSpec.behavior: Increases the value of the date segment that is highlighted.
Decreases the value of the date segment that is highlighted.
Moves to previous date segment in the input.
Moves to next date segment in the input.
Deletes value of the date segment.
